scope_gaps: fastener_access checks only orange_screw_boss_1..6 but manifest has 1..10

28 manifest solids never placed in any of the 19 steps; discrete-part subset: battery_back_void_foam_pad, glass_perimeter_cushion_{top,bottom,left,right}, antenna_aperture_tuner, orange_screw_boss_{7,8,9,10}
line-flow doc stale: 9.6mm/185g header, 4500mAh/5.7mm battery, '6 screws', battery-FPC-to-PMIC mated at S3 before PCB present

verdict.statement: Geometrically assemblable (0 trapped, 0 clashes); not assemblable as documented until the swell-void foam pad gets an assembly step (G01/G17) and all 10 screw bosses are installed + access-verified (G04). With those two sequence fixes plus the 19 major mitigations (most fixtures already exist), the e1-phone is assemblable.

gotchas.gotcha: battery_back_void_foam_pad (z -4.75..-4.57) has no assembly step; would be trapped behind the bonded cell so the 0.6mm swell-void foam shelf is physically absent on the line
gotchas.mitigation: add a step bonding the foam pad to back inner wall before battery_pouch (S3); add to checker ASSEMBLY ahead of battery

gotchas.gotcha: display+cover-glass bonded (S15/16) before side-frame screws (S17); a PCB reject after S6 forces destroying the OCA bond to rework
gotchas.mitigation: catch electrical faults pre-bond via test access (G27); treat post-bond PCB rework as scrap

gotchas.gotcha: antenna_aperture_tuner reflowed on PCB but not in S2 AOI callout
gotchas.mitigation: add tuner presence/orientation to S2 AOI

gotchas.gotcha: orange_screw_boss_7..10 never driven or access-checked; checker enumerates only bosses 1..6 and line-flow drives only 6 screws, leaving the drop-hardened (SF 2.11) structure under-fastened
gotchas.mitigation: extend check_fastener_access to range(1,11); assign all 10 bosses to S2/S5 with a torque map; update line-flow to 10 screws

gotchas.gotcha: bosses 5/6 (x +/-27, y18) sit ~5mm from the bonded LiPo cell at S5; a slipped driver can puncture the pouch
gotchas.mitigation: drive cell-adjacent bosses at S2 before battery placement, or shrouded torque-limited bit + battery guard plate on S5 fixture

gotchas.gotcha: FPC locking-probe and driver share open-back approach at different islands; no reach conflict found
gotchas.mitigation: retain locking-probe AOI confirmation

gotchas.gotcha: line-flow S3 routes+connects battery FPC to PMIC, but main_pcb (PMIC) is not placed until S6; mating a non-existent connector is impossible and pre-folding risks a sub-R0.8 crease
gotchas.mitigation: defer battery/PMIC FPC mating to S4; at S3 only tack the service loop, do not fold to final

gotchas.gotcha: display_fpc_bend_keepout clears 1.226mm at final pose only; transient bend radius during the S15 panel fold is unverified
gotchas.mitigation: S4-FIX-004 combs pre-form display FPC to >=R1.0 and hold during S15; in-process bend-radius gauge

gotchas.gotcha: split_interconnect_side_flex service loop reports 0.0mm clearance to neighbors; any over-insertion/vibration pinches it between PCB and side frame
gotchas.mitigation: relieve side-frame inner wall >=0.3mm locally or hold loop in S4 comb until after S17; re-run checker

gotchas.gotcha: top vs bottom split flex tails are similar and could be mated into the wrong connector at S4
gotchas.mitigation: keyed connector widths/pin-counts or shrouds

gotchas.gotcha: B2B/ZIF connectors seat +Z with main_pcb as backing (exists), but mate at S4 while PCB is only 4-of-6 screwed (S2) so an unscrewed quadrant can flex and half-mate
gotchas.mitigation: drive all PCB-retaining bosses at S2 before S4; post-mate continuity + seat-height AOI

gotchas.gotcha: half-/mis-mate of split-interconnect tails is the dominant S4 failure (lowest manual FPY 97.8%)
gotchas.mitigation: locking-probe seat confirmation + per-connector continuity + seat-force monitoring

gotchas.gotcha: no mezzanine/SoM stack beyond split interconnect; SoC/PMIC/radio reflowed under shield cans
gotchas.mitigation: none

gotchas.gotcha: cover-glass/display bond needs screen_bond_clamp_frame + 90s cure; line-flow places the fixture at S1 but the sequence bonds at step 15/16, and 90s cure >> 38s takt
gotchas.mitigation: parallel cure carrier in the unmanned tunnel; reconcile station map so the bond/cure station matches step 15/16

gotchas.gotcha: battery PSA-bonded at S3 with no pull-tab/rework access modeled; failed cell cannot be removed without prying near the FPC
gotchas.mitigation: add stretch-release pull-tab to battery PSA + tab-access slot in rib layout; document rework SOP

gotchas.gotcha: rear camera cover glass + 4 PSA strips bond into flush back wall; roller access from +Z is clear
gotchas.mitigation: none

gotchas.gotcha: swell-void foam shelf unplaced (shares root with G01); 0.6mm void is empty air, cell can swell into back wall and the DROP-2 force-limiting (0.6x coupling) assumption is invalid
gotchas.mitigation: add foam-pad step ahead of battery (see G01)

gotchas.gotcha: battery dropped +Z between ribs with FPC attached risks creasing the tail under the cell
gotchas.mitigation: place cell first, route FPC last into S4 comb; never drop cell onto its own folded tail

gotchas.gotcha: pull-tab/FPC orientation not keyed in CAD (plain rectangular pouch)
gotchas.mitigation: printed orientation fiducial + jig hard-stop on S3-FIX-003

gotchas.gotcha: rear/front camera alignment pins exist only as S6 test-station probes, not placement aids, yet cameras are placed at steps 4 and 14 with no datum pin
gotchas.mitigation: promote evt_fixture_*_camera_alignment_pin to the placement nests; register module corner to pin within +/-0.05mm

gotchas.gotcha: button caps side-inserted at S18/19 onto reflowed switches; 0.20mm travel, lateral misregistration misses the dome
gotchas.mitigation: labyrinth rails as slide datum + side-key insertion tool hard-stop + post-insert force/travel check (evt_fixture_button_force_probe)

gotchas.gotcha: meshes/gaskets at S9 (lowest insertion clearance 0.500mm) can be mis-seated or pinched at S17 closure; Wave-2 set an 8um compression-set CTQ
gotchas.mitigation: evt_fixture_bottom_acoustic_leak_mask + evt_fixture_earpiece_leak_mask leak-test at S6; PSA-locate meshes before S17

gotchas.gotcha: USB-C drip-lip + drain shelf + 4 perimeter gaskets; gasket mis-seat breaks IP54
gotchas.mitigation: gasket pick+seat vision nest; evt_fixture_usb_c_insertion_gauge at S6

gotchas.gotcha: cap+gasket can only enter at S18/19 after S17 close, side-loaded +/-X (power clearance 0.585mm); cap proud 0.30 > 0.20mm travel avoids rest pre-load
gotchas.mitigation: side-key insertion tool with elastomer retention; verify no gasket roll-over on insert

gotchas.gotcha: volume modeled as a single cap, not a two-dome rocker; two-dome alignment N/A as modeled but under-specified if production uses a rocker
gotchas.mitigation: confirm single-action or model the rocker pivot; flag to ME

gotchas.gotcha: SoC/PMIC/radio/tuner/cameras/flash-LED exposed open-faced S2..S17; anti-static mat specified but no wrist-strap/ionizer callout at camera/LED drop steps
gotchas.mitigation: wrist-strap continuity interlock at S2/S4/S9/S14; ionizer over open-back conveyor; ground pallet path

gotchas.gotcha: functional test (S6) runs after S17 close and S15/16 bond; no internal pogo/JTAG access once closed, so a board fault requires destroying the bonded glass
gotchas.mitigation: add pre-close ICT/boundary-scan before S15 bond; expose flashing/JTAG pads reachable from open back

gotchas.gotcha: no explicit flash station; flashing assumed via USB-C at S6
gotchas.mitigation: confirm bootloader flash over USB-C pre-bond else add open-back pogo flash before S15

gotchas.gotcha: closure is snap+screw (reworkable) but cover glass OCA-bonded and battery PSA-bonded (destructive to open); S6 95.5% FPY feeds a rework loop that is effectively scrap post-bond
gotchas.mitigation: catch electrical faults pre-bond (G27); snap hooks rated >=5 cycles; battery stretch-release tab (G15)

gotchas.gotcha: snap hooks pull-tested >=6N; repeated rework fatigues them
gotchas.mitigation: scrap-after-N-opens rule in rework SOP

gotchas.gotcha: near-square camera modules (10x10, 6.5x6.5) can be 90/180-deg mis-oriented without keying
gotchas.mitigation: asymmetric corner cut + keyed pocket; vacuum-pick orientation vision; alignment pin (G20)

gotchas.gotcha: plain rectangular battery pouch can be FPC-exit flipped
gotchas.mitigation: rib asymmetry + tab-side hard stop (G19)

gotchas.gotcha: top vs bottom split FPC tails interchangeable (see G10)
gotchas.mitigation: keyed connector widths/pin-counts

gotchas.gotcha: power vs volume caps differ in length (12 vs 21mm) and side; inherently keyed
gotchas.mitigation: none; retain side-specific insertion tools

gotchas.gotcha: display bond and camera windows particle-sensitive; cameras placed at S4/S14 sit open accumulating dust before the glass closes
gotchas.mitigation: laminar-flow hood over S14->S16; ionized blow-off + tack-roll before display bond; particle-count CTQ; keep front optic covered until S15

gotchas.gotcha: snap-platen press / torque driving generate particulate; as sequenced S17 close follows S15/16 bond so optics are covered
gotchas.mitigation: none
